message:
🐛 Add marketplace dashboards to sidebar with vanity URLs (#829)

- Installed dashboards now appear in the left sidebar immediately
- Uses marketplace item slug as URL (e.g., /custom-dashboard/sre-overview)
  instead of backend UUID for clean vanity URLs
- Seeds localStorage with cards for instant loading
- Removing a dashboard also removes its sidebar entry
- Exposes getInstalledDashboardId from useMarketplace for cleanup

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
